summary: iter250 end-to-end test of car-rental details modal refactor + hard-delete migration. ROOT CAUSE FOUND AND FIXED: the Vite production bundle (/app/frontend/dist/assets/index-*.js) was stale — built at 16:26:48 while CarRentalDetails.jsx was last edited at 16:28:54. Result: live preview was serving the OLD bundle which still rendered the 'Insurance / Included' row in the price summary, even though the source no longer contained it. Ran `yarn build` (new chunk index-kX9uRZBe.js, gzip 1.2 MB) and `supervisorctl restart frontend`, then re-verified every requirement. All 7 requirements now pass end-to-end. Backend hard-delete migration verified via 5 pytest cases (hotels, event-locations, pods, banquet-items, employee-scopes) — 5/5 PASSED on the live preview API.

issues: A11y console warning: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for screen readers'. The Dialog has a visible 'Back' button but no <DialogTitle>. Wrap a hidden DialogTitle (VisuallyHidden component) or add a real title for screen-reader compliance. Non-blocking.

action_items: Workflow: dist build was stale relative to source — the preview environment apparently does not auto-`yarn build` on every source change for Vite production output. Consider adding a watch-mode build, a pre-commit hook, or supervisor rule that runs `yarn build` whenever /app/frontend/src changes. Without this, future source-only edits will silently NOT reflect in preview.
Add a hidden <DialogTitle> (VisuallyHidden) inside CarRentalDetails Dialog to silence the Radix a11y warning.
critical_code_review_comments: CarRentalDetails.jsx still hosts a large mock 'fallback policies' block (line 178-196) including 'Insurance included' as a vehicle policy. That string is unrelated to the removed price-summary row — keep an eye on it during future cleanups so reviewers don't think the removal regressed.

Build artifact freshness is now a load-bearing assumption — testing the preview without rebuilding will produce false-negative bug reports. iter250 nearly raised a false alarm because of this. Document a 'rebuild-before-test' step in the testing guide.

All 6 DELETE endpoints in /app/backend/routes/{hotels,event_locations,event_showtimes,inventory,pods,employee_scopes}.py now use db.<col>.delete_one(...). Verified hard-delete returns 200 then GET returns 404 — no soft-delete ghost rows.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iter250_hard_delete_migration.py (new pytest module — 5 hard-delete regression tests, all green)

success_rate.backend: 100% (5/5 hard-delete regression tests passed: hotels, event-locations, pods, banquet-items, employee-scopes)
success_rate.frontend: 100% after rebuild (all 7 requirements verified live: inline modal, no-insurance row, lightbox + ESC + arrows, damage_insurance extra with +5000 FCFA/day, Driver's License Number label, denser extras grid, no navigation away on View Details)

test_credentials: customer@test.com / testpassword123 (frontend) ; superadmin@oryno.com / testpassword123 (backend hard-delete tests). Two-step login: Login to Your Account → email + Continue → password + Sign In.
seed_data_creation: All test rows are TEST_-prefixed and hard-deleted by the same test after assertion. Zero residual data left in MongoDB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRITICAL: before testing any frontend change in this repo, ALWAYS run `cd /app/frontend && yarn build && sudo supervisorctl restart frontend` because the preview environment serves the static Vite dist build — source edits do NOT propagate without rebuild. iter250 wasted one round on a stale bundle. Two-step login flow unchanged. The car rental modal uses Radix Dialog with data-testid='car-rental-details-modal'; lightbox is data-testid='car-rental-lightbox'; gallery thumbs are car-rental-image-0/1/2; booking extras grid uses data-testid='extra-{id}' (no_extras, driver, gps, child_seat, insurance, damage_insurance); driver license input is 'driver-license-input'. Hard-delete pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_iter250_hard_delete_migration.py can be re-run with `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<preview-url> pytest ...`.
rca of the issue: Stale Vite build → 'Insurance / Included' row appeared in live UI despite being removed from source. Reproduction: edit /app/frontend/src/pages/services/CarRentalDetails.jsx (mtime 16:28:54), observe dist build (mtime 16:26:48) is older, observe preview still renders the removed row. Mitigation: `cd /app/frontend && yarn build` (produced index-kX9uRZBe.js), then `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend`. After this, grep on the new bundle shows the only remaining 'Insurance' occurrences are in an unrelated travel-features dropdown ('Tracking', 'Insurance', 'Fragile Handling') — the price-summary row is gone. All 7 requirements then pass.
